title: Do social networks manipulate us?
body: Showing us links or content of our interest following our location, our search history, our profile, our history is a great advance, it saves us work in filtering but it also conditions our vision of the world and hides information from us. Google and Facebook may want to help us but this also gives them a lot of power and capacity for manipulation according to their interests. Here we have this video by Eli Pariser at a TED conference where he explains it to us in more detail. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wGq3HWILr6k
